name: safari-aio
title: Safari-Aio
description: safari all in one, search in safari tab, bookmark and history
author: dead_security

commands.name: search-safari-aio
commands.title: Search Safari-Aio
commands.description: search in safari tab, bookmark and history

preferences.name: safariAppIdentifier
preferences.title: Local Safari Browser
preferences.description: Switch between Safari or Safari Technology Preview

preferences.name: areRemoteTabsUsed
preferences.title: Devices
preferences.description: Include iCloud tabs across all your devices
preferences.label: iCloud

preferences.name: listDisplayMode
preferences.title: List Mode
preferences.description: Display as a flat mixed list or grouped sections

preferences.name: firstPriority
preferences.title: Priority 1
preferences.description: Which source should be shown first

preferences.name: secondPriority
preferences.title: Priority 2
preferences.description: Which source should be shown second

preferences.name: thirdPriority
preferences.title: Priority 3
preferences.description: Which source should be shown third

preferences.name: enableFuzzySearch
preferences.title: Fuzzy Search
preferences.description: When enabled, allows searching items using fuzzy search
preferences.label: Enable fuzzy search

preferences.name: maxResultsPerSource
preferences.title: Max Results Per Source
preferences.description: Limit the number of displayed results for tabs, bookmarks, and history

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
